name: Stitches Design System Helper
description: Provides instructions and snippets for using Stitches (@stitches/react) to style components.
author: Claude (UI/UX Specialist)

usage.convention: Use `styled` for creating styled components. Keep styles collocated with components.

snippets.button: const Button = styled('button', { backgroundColor: '$primary', color: '$text', padding: '$2 $3', borderRadius: '$2', '&:hover': { backgroundColor: '$primaryHover' } });

best_practices: Utilize theme tokens ($colors, $space, $radii) instead of hardcoded values.
Use variants for component states (e.g., variant: 'primary' | 'secondary').
Implement responsive styles using the `media` config (bp1, bp2, etc.).
